2026-06-22PS, CSISFederal Public Sector Labour Relations ActOrder Approving the Collective Agreement between the Canadian Security Intelligence Service and the Public Service Alliance of CanadaOrder authorizing the Canadian Security Intelligence Service to enter into a collective agreement with the Public Service Alliance of Canada for the period beginning on April 1, 2021 and ending on March 31, 2025.N/A
act: Federal Public Sector Labour Relations Act
subject: Order Approving the Collective Agreement between the Canadian Security Intelligence Service and the Public Service Alliance of Canada
precis: Order authorizing the Canadian Security Intelligence Service to enter into a collective agreement with the Public Service Alliance of Canada for the period beginning on April 1, 2021 and ending on March 31, 2025.
